runtime_mode.description: Runtime-mode intervention. The no_audit_chain enum value is retained for artifact compatibility and means M8 audit evidence emission disabled while transaction integrity remains preserved.

model_family.description: Model family / canonical name (e.g., qwen2.5-instruct, gpt-4o, claude-sonnet-4-6).

model_id.description: Specific revision or pinned ID where applicable.

parameter_count.description: Parameter count (e.g., 7000000000 or '7B'). Required even when approximate.

provider_snapshot.description: Provider-side version pin (e.g., dated cloud snapshot, commit hash for local checkpoint).

decoding_settings.description: Temperature, top_p, max_tokens, seed, etc. Must be sufficient to reproduce decoding.

manifest_snapshot_id.description: Identifier of the frozen manifest snapshot the trajectory was produced against (e.g., 'hai_0_2_X').

prompt_template_id.description: Identifier of the deployment-realistic prompt template used (e.g., 'deployment_full_v1').

prompt_template_hash.description: sha256 of the rendered system+user prompt for this trajectory's task and snapshot. Varies per task/snapshot combination.

prompt_template_file_hash.description: sha256 of the prompt template file's bytes (pre-substitution). Stable across all trajectories produced under the same template version. Added per F-CDX-RFR-R2-05.

invocation_context.description: Caller classification used by the CLI-dispatch agent_safe enforcer (M5). Benchmark subprocesses driven by a model are 'agent'; rule-baseline subprocesses are 'rule_baseline'; the maintainer's daily-driver loop is 'user'. Added per F-CDX-RFR-R2-03.

claim_tier.description: Which CLAIM_LADDER tier this trajectory is intended to support. T3 and T4 require a predeclared model roster, so model_roster_hash becomes required when claim_tier is T3 or T4.

model_roster_hash.description: sha256 of committed benchmark/governed_agent_bench/model_roster.md at the time this artifact was produced. Required when claim_tier is T3 or T4.

scorer_config_hash.description: Anchor for the scorer config that grades this trajectory; recorded redundantly with score.scorer_config_hash.
